bugs.description: Gas days in natural gas markets typically run from 06:00 to 06:00 (varies by region, e.g., 05:00 UTC in UK, 06:00 local in continental Europe/US). A timestamp before the gas day start hour (e.g., 03:00 on March 23) belongs to the previous gas day (March 22), but the function simply returns timestamp.date(), ignoring the hour offset entirely.
